text: A “traffic violator school instructor” is any person who provides instruction to traffic violators on behalf of a traffic violator school.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 1. WORDS AND PHRASES DEFINED [100 - 681]
##### § 626.4

A “traffic violator school instructor” is any person who provides instruction to traffic violators on behalf of a traffic violator school.

*(Added by Stats. 1985, Ch. 396, Sec. 3. Effective July 30, 1985.)*
